sources.title: LandIS as AI-accessible soil data infrastructure: evidence, use cases, and an MCP access strategy
sources.path: research/landis-data-source/LandIS as AI-accessible soil data infrastructure_ evidence, use cases, and an MCP access strategy.md

products.title: LandIS Soilscapes
products.abstract: Generalized soil pattern layer for regional screening and briefing outputs.
products.lineage: Derived from the LandIS Soilscapes product family and normalized into the local LandIS warehouse for point and area summary tooling.
limitations: Generalized polygons should not be treated as parcel-scale or trench-scale certainty.
Outputs require field verification before engineering or regulatory use.
products.license: Open-access portal terms still require operator validation for redistribution specifics.

products.title: LandIS Pipe Risk Screening
products.abstract: Derived corrosion and shrink-swell screening layer intended for early pipe-risk triage rather than design approval.
products.lineage: Aggregates normalized LandIS-derived corrosion and shrink-swell attributes inside the local warehouse and exposes a caveated area summary.
limitations: This is a screening indicator and not an engineering sign-off.
Made ground, recent utility works, and drainage interventions may materially change local conditions.
products.license: Derived screening output built from LandIS-backed warehouse tables; review LandIS licence terms before redistribution.

products.title: LandIS Soil Data Structures and Relationships
products.abstract: Join guidance for moving from LandIS associations to component series and related attributes.
products.lineage: Curated MCP-facing summary of the LandIS soil data structures paper.
limitations: This resource is a concise operational summary, not a replacement for the original source document.

products.title: LandIS Soil Classification Guidance
products.abstract: Operational summary of the LandIS national soil map and classification guide for MCP callers.
products.lineage: Curated MCP-facing summary of the LandIS classification paper.
limitations: This resource is a concise operational summary, not a replacement for the original source document.

citations.title: National Soil Map and Soil Classification

products.title: LandIS Licence and Open Access Status
products.abstract: Current governance note on the open-access transition and remaining licence questions that must be checked before wider redistribution.
products.lineage: Derived from the LandIS report and official LandIS portal/home-page statements available on 2026-04-04.
limitations: Portal licence text still requires direct operator validation before relying on redistribution assumptions.
products.license: Validation required against current LandIS portal terms.
